stemHtml: To obtain an aeroplane night rating, the applicant must complete...

options.a: at least 3 hours at night including 5 solo night take-offs and landings.
options.b: at least 5 hours at night including 5 solo night take-offs and landings.
options.c: at least 3 hours at night including 3 solo night take-offs and landings.
options.d: at least 5 hours at night including 3 solo night take-offs and landings.
